meaning.en: an ingredient's weight expressed as a percentage of total flour weight
meaning.de: Gewicht einer Zutat als Prozentsatz des gesamten Mehlgewichts
meaning.es: peso de un ingrediente expresado como porcentaje del peso total de harina
meaning.fr: poids d'un ingrédient exprimé en pourcentage du poids total de farine

meaning.en: actual weight of the ingredient, in any consistent unit
meaning.de: tatsächliches Gewicht der Zutat in einer beliebigen einheitlichen Einheit
meaning.es: peso real del ingrediente, en cualquier unidad coherente
meaning.fr: poids réel de l'ingrédient, dans une unité cohérente

meaning.en: total weight of all flour in the formula, always treated as 100%
meaning.de: Gesamtgewicht des gesamten Mehls in der Formel, immer als 100% behandelt
meaning.es: peso total de toda la harina en la fórmula, siempre tratado como 100%
meaning.fr: poids total de toute la farine dans la formule, toujours traité comme 100%

example: 10 kg flour (=100%) and 3.5 kg water: water_pct = (3.5/10)*100 = 35%. Conversely, at 35% water_pct with 10 kg flour: water_weight = 10*(35/100) = 3.5 kg.

name.es: Hidratación a partir de los ingredientes

meaning.en: plain water weight added directly to the dough
meaning.de: reines Wassergewicht, das direkt dem Teig zugegeben wird
meaning.es: peso de agua pura añadida directamente a la masa
meaning.fr: poids d'eau pure ajoutée directement à la pâte

meaning.en: milk weight, counted at 87% water content
meaning.de: Milchgewicht, mit 87% Wasseranteil angesetzt
meaning.es: peso de la leche, contado con un 87% de contenido de agua
meaning.fr: poids de lait, compté à 87% de teneur en eau

meaning.en: whole egg weight, counted at 75% water content
meaning.de: Gewicht des ganzen Eis, mit 75% Wasseranteil angesetzt
meaning.es: peso del huevo entero, contado con un 75% de contenido de agua
meaning.fr: poids de l'œuf entier, compté à 75% de teneur en eau

meaning.en: butter weight, counted at 16% water content (about 83% fat)
meaning.de: Buttergewicht, mit 16% Wasseranteil angesetzt (rund 83% Fettanteil)
meaning.es: peso de la mantequilla, contado con un 16% de contenido de agua (unos 83% de grasa)
meaning.fr: poids de beurre, compté à 16% de teneur en eau (environ 83% de matière grasse)

meaning.en: total flour weight, the baker's-percentage baseline
meaning.de: Gesamtmehlgewicht, die Bezugsgröße der Bäckerprozentrechnung
meaning.es: peso total de harina, la base del porcentaje panadero
meaning.fr: poids total de farine, la base du pourcentage boulanger

example: Santa Lucia crown, 500g flour: 125g milk (x0.87=108.75g water) + 125g water + 110g egg (x0.75=82.5g water) + 50g butter (x0.16=8g water) = 324.25g effective water; hydration = 324.25/500*100 = 64.85%, matching the source's reported 64.9%.

name.es: Límite de hidratación según la proteína de la harina
name.fr: Plafond d'hydratation selon la teneur en protéines de la farine

meaning.en: the hydration percentage the formula already uses with the base flour
meaning.de: der Hydrationsanteil, den die Formel bereits mit dem Ausgangsmehl verwendet
meaning.es: el porcentaje de hidratación que la fórmula ya usa con la harina base
meaning.fr: le pourcentage d'hydratation déjà utilisé par la formule avec la farine de base

meaning.en: protein percentage of the base flour
meaning.de: Proteingehalt des Ausgangsmehls in Prozent
meaning.es: porcentaje de proteína de la harina base
meaning.fr: pourcentage de protéines de la farine de base

meaning.en: protein percentage of the replacement flour
meaning.de: Proteingehalt des Ersatzmehls in Prozent
meaning.es: porcentaje de proteína de la harina de sustitución
meaning.fr: pourcentage de protéines de la farine de remplacement

meaning.en: estimated hydration percentage suited to the replacement flour
meaning.de: geschätzter, zum Ersatzmehl passender Hydrationsanteil
meaning.es: porcentaje de hidratación estimado adecuado para la harina de sustitución
meaning.fr: pourcentage d'hydratation estimé adapté à la farine de remplacement

example: Switching from King Arthur all-purpose flour (11.7% protein) to King Arthur bread flour (12.7% protein) in a 65%-hydration formula: hydration_pct_new = 65 + 2.5*(12.7-11.7) = 67.5%.

name.en: Fat and sugar thresholds in enriched dough
name.de: Fett- und Zuckerschwellen im angereicherten Teig
name.es: Umbrales de grasa y azúcar en masa enriquecida
name.fr: Seuils de matière grasse et de sucre en pâte enrichie

expression: fat_pct <= 10 -> mix_from_start; fat_pct > 10 -> add_after_gluten_development (traditional rule, increasingly contested)

meaning.en: added fat (butter/oil) weight as a percentage of total flour weight
meaning.de: zugesetztes Fett (Butter/Öl) als Prozentsatz des Gesamtmehlgewichts
meaning.es: grasa añadida (mantequilla/aceite) como porcentaje del peso total de harina
meaning.fr: matière grasse ajoutée (beurre/huile) en pourcentage du poids total de farine

meaning.en: added sugar weight as a percentage of total flour weight
meaning.de: zugesetzter Zucker als Prozentsatz des Gesamtmehlgewichts
meaning.es: azúcar añadido como porcentaje del peso total de harina
meaning.fr: sucre ajouté en pourcentage du poids total de farine

example: A 500g-flour dough with 10% fat (50g) can usually be mixed in from the start; traditional guidance holds back fat above 10% (e.g. a 40% brioche) until after gluten development, though some bakers now report success mixing 40% fat in from the start. Separately, a controlled fermentation trial measured CO2 output after 3h rising from 107.9 mL at 0% sucrose to a peak of 203.7 mL at 7%, then falling to 157.7 mL at 14% and to 94.3 mL (below the unsweetened baseline) at 21%, showing sugar's effect on yeast is non-monotonic rather than a single cutoff.

name.es: Temperatura deseada de la masa (3 factores)
name.fr: Température de pâte désirée (méthode à 3 facteurs)

meaning.en: desired dough temperature right after mixing
meaning.de: gewünschte Teigtemperatur unmittelbar nach dem Mischen
meaning.es: temperatura deseada de la masa justo después del mezclado
meaning.fr: température de pâte désirée juste après le pétrissage

meaning.en: ambient/room (air) temperature
meaning.de: Raum- bzw. Umgebungstemperatur
meaning.es: temperatura ambiente/de la sala
meaning.fr: température ambiante/de la pièce

meaning.en: temperature of the flour before mixing
meaning.de: Temperatur des Mehls vor dem Mischen
meaning.es: temperatura de la harina antes de mezclar
meaning.fr: température de la farine avant pétrissage

meaning.en: estimated temperature rise from mechanical mixing
meaning.de: geschätzter Temperaturanstieg durch das maschinelle Mischen
meaning.es: aumento de temperatura estimado por el mezclado mecánico
meaning.fr: hausse de température estimée due au pétrissage mécanique

meaning.en: water temperature to mix in, the value being solved for
meaning.de: einzumischende Wassertemperatur, die gesuchte Größe
meaning.es: temperatura del agua a mezclar, el valor que se busca
meaning.fr: température de l'eau à incorporer, la valeur recherchée

example: Target DDT 78F, flour 71F, room 72F, stand-mixer friction factor 22F: water_temp = 78*3 - 72 - 71 - 22 = 69F.

name.es: Temperatura deseada de la masa con prefermento (4 factores)
name.fr: Température de pâte désirée avec preferment (méthode à 4 facteurs)

meaning.en: desired dough temperature right after mixing
meaning.de: gewünschte Teigtemperatur unmittelbar nach dem Mischen
meaning.es: temperatura deseada de la masa justo después del mezclado
meaning.fr: température de pâte désirée juste après le pétrissage

meaning.en: temperature of the levain/preferment/starter before mixing
meaning.de: Temperatur des Vorteigs/Sauerteigs vor dem Mischen
meaning.es: temperatura del levain/prefermento antes de mezclar
meaning.fr: température du levain/preferment avant pétrissage

meaning.en: ambient/room (air) temperature
meaning.de: Raum- bzw. Umgebungstemperatur
meaning.es: temperatura ambiente/de la sala
meaning.fr: température ambiante/de la pièce

meaning.en: temperature of the flour before mixing
meaning.de: Temperatur des Mehls vor dem Mischen
meaning.es: temperatura de la harina antes de mezclar
meaning.fr: température de la farine avant pétrissage

meaning.en: estimated temperature rise from mechanical mixing
meaning.de: geschätzter Temperaturanstieg durch das maschinelle Mischen
meaning.es: aumento de temperatura estimado por el mezclado mecánico
meaning.fr: hausse de température estimée due au pétrissage mécanique

example: Target DDT 78F, flour 71F, room 72F, stand-mixer friction 22F, ripe levain at 76F: water_temp = 78*4 - 72 - 71 - 22 - 76 = 71F. Note: Wordloaf's Andrew Janjigian instead weights the preferment term by the preferment's percentage of the total formula rather than treating it as a plain 4th factor, arguing a small levain should sway the average less than a large one.

meaning.en: friction factor assumed for the batch just mixed
meaning.de: für den soeben gemischten Teig angenommener Reibungsfaktor
meaning.es: factor de fricción asumido para el lote recién mezclado
meaning.fr: facteur de friction supposé pour le lot qui vient d'être pétri

meaning.en: the dough temperature that was aimed for
meaning.de: die angestrebte Teigtemperatur
meaning.es: la temperatura de masa que se buscaba
meaning.fr: la température de pâte visée

meaning.en: the dough temperature actually measured after mixing
meaning.de: die nach dem Mischen tatsächlich gemessene Teigtemperatur
meaning.es: la temperatura de masa realmente medida tras el mezclado
meaning.fr: la température de pâte réellement mesurée après pétrissage

meaning.en: the corrected friction factor to use on the next batch
meaning.de: der korrigierte Reibungsfaktor für den nächsten Teig
meaning.es: el factor de fricción corregido para el siguiente lote
meaning.fr: le facteur de friction corrigé à utiliser pour le prochain lot

example: A baker assumes friction_factor_used=24F, mixes, and the dough reads 75F against a 77F target (2F short): friction_factor_next = 24 - (77-75) = 22F for the next batch. Starting-point ranges before any calibration: hand kneading 6-8F (about 3-4C), home stand mixer 22-24F (about 12-13C), spiral/commercial mixer 24-28F (about 13-16C) per Hamelman.

name.es: Conversión de levadura (fresca, seca activa, instantánea)
name.fr: Conversion de levure (fraîche, sèche active, instantanée)

expression: active_dry_g = fresh_g * 0.4; instant_g = fresh_g * 0.33; active_dry_g_simplified = fresh_g / 2; instant_g_simplified = fresh_g / 3

meaning.en: fresh (cake/compressed) yeast weight in grams
meaning.de: Gewicht der Frischhefe (Presshefe) in Gramm
meaning.es: peso de la levadura fresca (en pastilla) en gramos
meaning.fr: poids de levure fraîche (levure de boulanger pressée) en grammes

meaning.en: equivalent active dry yeast weight per King Arthur's professional chart
meaning.de: äquivalentes Gewicht an Trockenhefe nach der professionellen Tabelle von King Arthur
meaning.es: peso equivalente de levadura seca activa según la tabla profesional de King Arthur
meaning.fr: poids équivalent de levure sèche active selon le tableau professionnel de King Arthur

meaning.en: equivalent instant yeast weight per King Arthur's professional chart
meaning.de: äquivalentes Gewicht an Instanthefe nach der professionellen Tabelle von King Arthur
meaning.es: peso equivalente de levadura instantánea según la tabla profesional de King Arthur
meaning.fr: poids équivalent de levure instantanée selon le tableau professionnel de King Arthur

example: 30g fresh yeast: King Arthur's professional ratio gives 30*0.4=12g active dry or 30*0.33=9.9g (~10g) instant; a commonly quoted simplified home rule instead gives 30/2=15g active dry or 30/3=10g instant. Separately, many calculator sites claim instant yeast is 25% more potent by weight than active dry (implying active_dry_g = instant_g*1.25), but King Arthur's own 2022 blog and Red Star's conversion chart both treat active dry and instant as substitutable 1:1 in practice, framing the difference as dissolving speed and rise time rather than final leavening power.

name.fr: Mise à l'échelle temps-température de la fermentation

meaning.en: known fermentation/bulk time at the reference temperature
meaning.de: bekannte Gär-/Stockgarezeit bei der Referenztemperatur
meaning.es: tiempo de fermentación/bulk conocido a la temperatura de referencia
meaning.fr: temps de fermentation/pointage connu à la température de référence

meaning.en: the reference dough temperature
meaning.de: die Referenz-Teigtemperatur
meaning.es: la temperatura de masa de referencia
meaning.fr: la température de pâte de référence

meaning.en: the new dough temperature to estimate time for
meaning.de: die neue Teigtemperatur, für die die Zeit geschätzt werden soll
meaning.es: la nueva temperatura de masa para la que se estima el tiempo
meaning.fr: la nouvelle température de pâte pour laquelle estimer le temps

meaning.en: degrees of temperature change that double or halve fermentation time; sources disagree (about 8C per The Sourdough Journey, about 5C per Weekend Bakery)
meaning.de: Temperaturänderung, die die Gärzeit verdoppelt oder halbiert; Quellen widersprechen sich (rund 8C nach The Sourdough Journey, rund 5C nach Weekend Bakery)
meaning.es: cambio de temperatura que duplica o reduce a la mitad el tiempo de fermentación; las fuentes no coinciden (unos 8C según The Sourdough Journey, unos 5C según Weekend Bakery)
meaning.fr: variation de température qui double ou divise par deux le temps de fermentation; les sources divergent (environ 8C selon The Sourdough Journey, environ 5C selon Weekend Bakery)

example: A dough that bulk-ferments in 4h at 24C would, per The Sourdough Journey's 15F/8C-doubling rule, take about 8h at 16C. Per Weekend Bakery's 5C-doubling rule ('fermentation roughly doubles for every 5C increase'), that same doubling would already occur by 19C, a materially different sensitivity to temperature. Below about 4C, cold retard is generally described as suspending yeast activity almost entirely while acid-forming bacteria keep working slowly; The Perfect Loaf reports successfully retarding shaped dough for up to 12h at 50F/10C and only about 8h once the retarder runs above 46-48F/8-9C.

name.es: Proporción de construcción del levain e inoculación
name.fr: Ratio de construction du levain et inoculation

meaning.en: weight of mature starter/levain used to seed the new build
meaning.de: Gewicht des reifen Anstellguts, mit dem der neue Ansatz beimpft wird
meaning.es: peso de masa madre/levain maduro usado para sembrar la nueva construcción
meaning.fr: poids de levain mûr utilisé pour ensemencer la nouvelle construction

meaning.en: flour weight added in this levain build
meaning.de: in diesem Anstellgut-Ansatz zugesetztes Mehlgewicht
meaning.es: peso de harina añadido en esta construcción de levain
meaning.fr: poids de farine ajouté dans cette construction de levain

meaning.en: water weight added in this levain build
meaning.de: in diesem Anstellgut-Ansatz zugesetztes Wassergewicht
meaning.es: peso de agua añadido en esta construcción de levain
meaning.fr: poids d'eau ajouté dans cette construction de levain

meaning.en: starter weight as a percentage of the total build, which drives peak timing
meaning.de: Anstellgut-Gewicht als Prozentsatz des gesamten Ansatzes, maßgeblich für den Reifezeitpunkt
meaning.es: peso de masa madre como porcentaje de la construcción total, determina el momento de pico
meaning.fr: poids de levain en pourcentage de la construction totale, déterminant le moment du pic

example: A 1:5:5 build (20g mature starter, 100g flour, 100g water) has inoculation_pct = 20/(20+100+100)*100 = 9.1%, which per the 5-10% inoculation banding should peak in about 16h or more at room temperature; a 1:1:1 build (100% inoculation) instead peaks in about 3-4h. Hydration also matters: a 50-65%-hydration stiff levain favors acetic-acid production (reads tangier), while a 100%+ liquid levain favors lactic acid (milder, rounder sourness).

meaning.en: flour weight contained inside the poolish/biga/levain
meaning.de: im Poolish/Biga/Anstellgut enthaltenes Mehlgewicht
meaning.es: peso de harina contenido dentro del poolish/biga/levain
meaning.fr: poids de farine contenu dans le poolish/biga/levain

meaning.en: total flour weight across the whole formula, preferment included
meaning.de: Gesamtmehlgewicht der gesamten Formel, Vorteig eingerechnet
meaning.es: peso total de harina en toda la fórmula, incluido el prefermento
meaning.fr: poids total de farine dans toute la formule, preferment inclus

meaning.en: share of total flour that ferments in the preferment before final mixing
meaning.de: Anteil des Gesamtmehls, der vor dem endgültigen Mischen im Vorteig fermentiert
meaning.es: proporción de la harina total que fermenta en el prefermento antes del mezclado final
meaning.fr: part de la farine totale qui fermente dans le preferment avant le pétrissage final

example: King Arthur's professional ciabatta: 3kg biga flour + 7kg final-dough flour = 10kg total flour, so prefermented_flour_pct = 3/10*100 = 30%, with the biga fermented about 16h before final mixing. Poolish for baguette commonly runs 20-40% of total flour; levain for country sourdough commonly runs 15-25%, occasionally 10-50%; mixed rye formulas often run 30-50% or more because rye needs acid to bake well, not just gluten.

name.es: Sal según el peso de la harina
name.fr: Sel selon le poids de la farine

meaning.en: total flour weight, the baker's-percentage baseline
meaning.de: Gesamtmehlgewicht, die Bezugsgröße der Bäckerprozentrechnung
meaning.es: peso total de harina, la base del porcentaje panadero
meaning.fr: poids total de farine, la base du pourcentage boulanger

meaning.en: salt weight as a percentage of total flour weight
meaning.de: Salzgewicht als Prozentsatz des Gesamtmehlgewichts
meaning.es: peso de sal como porcentaje del peso total de harina
meaning.fr: poids de sel en pourcentage du poids total de farine

meaning.en: the actual salt weight to add
meaning.de: das tatsächlich zuzugebende Salzgewicht
meaning.es: el peso real de sal a añadir
meaning.fr: le poids de sel réel à ajouter

example: 1000g total flour at 2% salt: salt_weight = 1000*(2/100) = 20g. Named formulas cluster tightly: Hamelman runs 1.8-2%, Robertson about 2%, Forkish 2.1-2.2%. Below about 1.5% the dough ferments faster and tastes flat; above about 2.5% both yeast activity and gluten strength suffer.

name.es: Peso de la masa según el volumen del molde
name.fr: Poids de pâte selon le volume du moule

expression: dough_weight_g = pan_volume_cm3 * density_factor, density_factor disagrees by source (~0.25 g/cm3 low-density model vs ~0.56-0.60 g/cm3 magic-number model)

meaning.en: usable pan/tin volume in cubic centimeters (1 cm3 = 1 mL)
meaning.de: nutzbares Form-/Kastenvolumen in Kubikzentimetern (1 cm3 = 1 mL)
meaning.es: volumen útil del molde en centímetros cúbicos (1 cm3 = 1 mL)
meaning.fr: volume utile du moule en centimètres cubes (1 cm3 = 1 mL)

meaning.en: grams of raw dough per cm3 of pan volume; sources disagree substantially on this constant
meaning.de: Gramm Rohteig pro cm3 Formvolumen; die Quellen widersprechen sich bei dieser Konstante deutlich
meaning.es: gramos de masa cruda por cm3 de volumen del molde; las fuentes discrepan sustancialmente en esta constante
meaning.fr: grammes de pâte crue par cm3 de volume du moule; les sources divergent sensiblement sur cette constante

meaning.en: raw dough weight to scale into the pan, in grams
meaning.de: in die Form einzuwiegendes Rohteiggewicht in Gramm
meaning.es: peso de masa cruda a pesar para el molde, en gramos
meaning.fr: poids de pâte crue à peser pour le moule, en grammes

example: A 2400 cm3 (mL) pan: princessbamboo.com's 4:1 volume:weight rule gives about 2400/4 = 600g dough (the author's actual loaf used 580g). Bake With Jack's white-bread 'magic number' method instead computes density_factor = 1/1.78 = 0.562 g/cm3, giving 2400*0.562 = 1349g for the same pan, over twice as much. The Pantry Mama's real pan-size chart (e.g. a 9.25x5.25x2.75in open pan at 800g) sits closer to the lower figure. Bake With Jack's magic numbers also vary by flour: 1.78 white, 1.71 half-wholemeal, 1.66 wholemeal.

name.en: Total dough weight from piece count
name.es: Peso total de masa según el número de piezas
name.fr: Poids total de pâte selon le nombre de pièces

expression: total_dough_weight = piece_count * piece_weight + bench_allowance; flour_weight = total_dough_weight / (sum_of_all_pcts / 100)

meaning.en: number of finished dough pieces (loaves/rolls) wanted
meaning.de: gewünschte Anzahl fertiger Teigstücke (Brote/Brötchen)
meaning.es: número de piezas de masa terminadas deseadas (panes/bollos)
meaning.fr: nombre de pièces de pâte finies souhaitées (pains/petits pains)

meaning.en: target weight of each dough piece
meaning.de: Zielgewicht je Teigstück
meaning.es: peso objetivo de cada pieza de masa
meaning.fr: poids cible de chaque pièce de pâte

meaning.en: small extra weight added to cover scaling/rounding/trim loss
meaning.de: kleiner Gewichtszuschlag zum Ausgleich von Abwaage-, Rundungs- und Verschnittverlust
meaning.es: peso adicional pequeño para cubrir la merma de pesado, redondeo y recorte
meaning.fr: léger supplément de poids pour couvrir les pertes de pesée, d'arrondi et de parage

meaning.en: sum of every ingredient's baker's percentage, including flour's own 100
meaning.de: Summe aller Bäckerprozente sämtlicher Zutaten, einschließlich der 100 des Mehls selbst
meaning.es: suma de los porcentajes panaderos de todos los ingredientes, incluido el 100 de la propia harina
meaning.fr: somme des pourcentages boulangers de tous les ingrédients, y compris les 100 de la farine elle-même

example: 1 loaf (950g) + 4 rolls (80g each) = 1270g, plus a 10g bench/rounding allowance = 1280g target dough. If a base recipe yields 961g dough from 570g flour, the scaling factor is 1280/961 = 1.33, so new flour weight = 570*1.33 = 758g, and every other ingredient scales by the same 1.33 factor.

name.es: Peso de dosificación según la merma de cocción
name.fr: Poids de pesée selon la perte à la cuisson

meaning.en: the finished, baked and cooled weight wanted for one piece
meaning.de: das gewünschte fertige, gebackene und ausgekühlte Gewicht eines Stücks
meaning.es: el peso final horneado y enfriado deseado para una pieza
meaning.fr: le poids final cuit et refroidi souhaité pour une pièce

meaning.en: percentage weight lost to evaporation during proofing, baking, and cooling
meaning.de: prozentualer Gewichtsverlust durch Verdunstung während Gare, Backen und Auskühlen
meaning.es: porcentaje de peso perdido por evaporación durante el fermentado, horneado y enfriado
meaning.fr: pourcentage de poids perdu par évaporation pendant la pousse, la cuisson et le refroidissement

meaning.en: the raw dough weight to portion out before baking
meaning.de: das vor dem Backen abzuwiegende Rohteiggewicht
meaning.es: el peso de masa cruda a porcionar antes de hornear
meaning.fr: le poids de pâte crue à peser avant la cuisson

example: A finished 800g sandwich loaf that loses 10-12% of its weight during proofing and baking needs scaling_weight = 800/(1-0.10) = 889g to 800/(1-0.12) = 909g, matching the commonly cited 890-900g practical range.
